questionHtml:
Ammonium nitrate, NH4NO3, is used as a high nitrogen fertilizer.

Solid ammonium nitrate can decompose to gaseous dinitrogen monoxide and liquid water.

Calculate the volume of dinitrogen monoxide produced at STP when a 5.00 g sample of ammonium nitrate decomposes. Use section 2 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
«5.00 g ÷ 80.06 g mol−1 =» 0.0625 mol «NH4NO3» ✔

«1:1 mol ratio»

«0.0625 mol N2O×22.7 dm3mol=» 1.42 «dm3» ✔

 

Award [2] for correct final answer.

Accept range 1.36 – 1.43 «dm3».

Accept calculations based on PV=nRT.

meta.title: Calculate the volume of dinitrogen monoxide produced at STP when a 5.00 g sample of ammonium nitrate decomposes. Use section 2 of the data booklet.
